E14
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 講述兩名截然不同的人 ─ 缺乏同情心的騙子與同情心氾濫的律師因與邪惡抗爭，組成了一支看起來不太可能實現的聯盟後所發生的故事。

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 在華麗成功的三位朋友面前，出現一位 10 年前因她們的謊言而成為殺人犯的老朋友，她為揭開三人隱藏在假面之下的真面目而決定背水一戰。而四位老朋友也因一位男人面臨人生漩渦，彼此展開關乎嫉妒和慾望戰爭的故事。

programme.desc: SpongeBob cleans up all the garbage in town... except for one stubborn ball of trash. // SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs attempt to serve Krabby Patties at Pearl's school without being caught by the strict lunch lady.

programme.title: E311 - Dodging Danger
programme.desc: When Henry uses his new super power to compete in a Dodge-A-Leen tournament, Ray, Schwoz, and Charlotte go undercover to teach Henry a lesson.

programme.title: E115 - Test Friends
programme.desc: Without them knowing, Captain Man puts Danger Force through a series of tests to see if he can trust them. But when the tests get out of hand, the tables turn on who can be trusted.

programme.title: E101 - Pilot
programme.desc: After Tori fills in for her ailing sister in a big musical showcase, Tori is asked to enroll at an elite performing arts high school. But once there, Tori struggles to fit in to her new surroundings.

programme.title: E110 - Donnie Goes Deep
programme.desc: Donnie and Wingnut go to restore power to the Lair but get trapped by the East River 3! The water is rising and they're not alone... there's a monster down there with them!

programme.title: E101 - Thundercover
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe bring Chloe on an undercover mission to Secret Shores so she can experience life as a normal kid. When a new supervillain threat emerges, the trio must stay in town longer than they anticipated.

programme.title: E113 - For Bros About to Rock / It's a Loud, Loud, Loud, Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln is going to his first rock concert, and Luna is determined to make it the greatest experience ever. // Lincoln finds a letter in the attic leading him to believe there is money hidden within the Loud house!

programme.title: E114 - Toads and Tiaras / Two Boys and a Baby
programme.desc: After Lola gets sick and can’t compete in her pageant, Lincoln coaches Lana to take her place. // Thinking it’ll be easy, Lincoln and Clyde take on the task of babysitting the youngest Loud, Lily.

programme.title: E503 - The Boss Maybe
programme.desc: Secret agents Lincoln and Clyde investigate the Loud's suspicious new neighbors.

programme.title: E402 - The Dated Game / Ice Cream Headache

programme.desc: Barbabright captured a melody from Mars. The Barbapapas build a rocket to go to the red planet. // While travelling to Mars, the Barbapapas meet a family of Barbamartians. They have no time to get acquainted when a giant plant attacks the village.

programme.title: E101 - Balloon
programme.desc: Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: E215 - The Crew Builds An Indoor Skydiving Center / The Crew Builds A Roller Rink
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway and Mr. Ducky-Doo want to show their skydiving skills. But when wind gets in the way, the pups help them sky dive on the ground! // When Wheeler and Truffles the pig can't ice skate, the crew finds a construction solution with wheels!

programme.title: E302 - Unicornasaurus / The Grumple Games
programme.desc: Dora helps Benny and Uni the Unicornasaurus get their magic paintbrush back so he can be reunited with his pet, Bunnicorn. // Dora teams up with Hearty the Grumple so she can finally compete in the Grumple Games.

programme.title: E202 - Princess For A Day / Barbabeau's Adventure
programme.desc: Barbabelle proudly announces to her family that she wants to become a princess. // Barbabravo is moping with boredom, his brothers and sisters are all busy and no one wants to play with him.

programme.title: E713 - Arcade Adventure
programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, and Sparkle are at the arcade-and Sparkle's got her eye on an amazing glitter rocket! But, when she doesn't have enough tickets for the rocket, the friends must jump inside different video games and win enough tickets to collect the prize!

programme.title: E302 - Unicornasaurus / The Grumple Games

programme.title: E204 - Dreams And Illusions
programme.desc: While everyone sleeps peacefully, one may wonder what the Barbababies could be dreaming about.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: Nisha Katona is cooking a Bengali stuffed fish in banana leaves, a thyme and apple cake for dessert and a stunning roast rib of beef with some spiced cumin green beans.

programme.title: E4 - Invisible Hideaways
programme.desc: In Uruguay we venture deep within the rural countryside to an area of remote forests and lakes to a one hundred hectare resort of mirrored cabins. In Sweden we visit the Kolarbyn Eco Lodge - a rustic retreat of 12 hobbit like huts that are replicas of those built in this forest by people making charcoal from as far back as the 1800s.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: Together on Graham's sofa tonight: Hollywood star of 'Alien' and 'Avatar', Sigourney Weaver, taking to the West End stage in Shakespeare's 'The Tempest'; Hollywood star Nicholas Hoult, starring in the remake of the classic gothic horror 'Nosferatu'; celebrity chef Jamie Oliver, whose new cookbook is 'Simply Jamie'; Lolly Adefope, playing set assistant Dag in the superhero-spoof series 'The Franchise'; and supergroup Coldplay, who chat and perform their current single 'All My Life'.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code - Myth Or Truth?
programme.desc: Dan Brown's novel 'The Da Vinci Code” is one of the century's most successful thrillers worldwide. But how much truth is behind the claims made in the book - and what is pure fiction?

programme.title: Relative Or Foe? - Neanderthals And Us
programme.desc: Although they were physically superior to us, Neanderthals did not prevail. What made them different and why did they become extinct? How close or hostile were they to modern man?

programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Truth Or Fake[Live]
programme.desc: In our fast-moving challenging world it is of fundamental importance to sort what's true from what's fake online. programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: The European Debrief
programme.desc: Live headlines,breaking news, analysis and interviews from Europe's News Centre.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Focus reports – an event or current affairs issue is put under the spotlight for in-depth analysis.

programme.title: E3 - A Life Among Trees
programme.desc: How many trees can you find in the Amazon? And what’s it like to live up in them? Travel through the canopy and see how more than 1200 species of trees coexist. Plus, follow monkeys and other creatures who call these trees home.

programme.title: E3 - Villains
programme.desc: Meet nature’s most wanted and see why the baddest of the bad don’t get the respect they deserve. Admire the great white shark’s electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

programme.title: E2 - A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends including Charlotte, a schnauzer who enjoys bath time with her guinea pig pal Wallace, and a randy ram called Hamish who likes to sneak off to live with a herd of dairy cows instead of his own kind.

programme.title: E1 - Tropical
programme.desc: Circle the equator for a look at the diverse species that dwell in tropical forests. Meet a lone sloth growing a mini-forest, lemurs that share and share alike, and elephants that tend to their woodland gardens. Then explore the region’s dark side.

programme.title: E3 - Villains
programme.desc: Meet nature’s most wanted and see why the baddest of the bad don’t get the respect they deserve. Admire the great white shark’s electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

programme.title: E12 - Sub Sahara
programme.desc: The latitudes south of the Sahara offer vastly different battlegrounds for a wide range of warriors. Male giraffes swing their heads like wrecking balls, zebras boast the most powerful kick in the animal kingdom, and chimpanzee warfare is eerily familiar.

programme.title: E3 - Villains
programme.desc: Meet nature’s most wanted and see why the baddest of the bad don’t get the respect they deserve. Admire the great white shark’s electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

programme.title: E4 - Dry Season
programme.desc: The dry season is the toughest time of year. With lower water levels and less space, animals need to quickly learn new skills to survive…and if they don’t, predatory vultures will swoop in for a feast.

programme.title: E1 - How to Catch a Lizard
programme.desc: Tag along as Dr. Amanda rescues a blind pet baboon, and watch Dr. Charlotte’s tricky surgery on a pangolin whose leg must be amputated after a run-in with poachers. Later, chase a rhino, two young baboons gone AWOL, and a fiesty monitor lizard.

programme.title: E2 - An Island Home
programme.desc: Face a tough decision when Esti’s leg infection puts the brakes on this young duiker’s release. Then track and collar a young lion with Dr. Amanda; check on an ailing bush baby; and greet the noisy new addition to the center, a grumpy grey parrot.

programme.title: E3 - The Young Ones
programme.desc: In this episode of Amazing Animal Friends a rescued orphaned rhino befriended by a playful dog and doting sheep, a big bunny rabbit that babysits boisterous baby lambs, and a porcupine that helps two English bulldogs rehabilitate injured animals.

programme.title: E7 - Chilema and Her Brother
programme.desc: Chilema is an Elephant with half a trunk; losing the tip to a poacher's snare. It was intended to catch antelope for bushmeat. But the snare's indiscriminate nature means other animals often fall foul of them, with devastating results. Chilema is now having to adapt to life without an elephants most important appendage. She must learn how to eat, drink and also take a mud bath to ensure her survival. With the added challenge of the harsh dry season, Chilema is fighting against the odds to survive.

programme.title: E3 - Villains
programme.desc: Meet nature’s most wanted and see why the baddest of the bad don’t get the respect they deserve. Admire the great white shark’s electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

programme.desc: The dry season is the toughest time of year. With lower water levels and less space, animals need to quickly learn new skills to survive…and if they don’t, predatory vultures will swoop in for a feast.

programme.title: E1 - How to Catch a Lizard
programme.desc: Tag along as Dr. Amanda rescues a blind pet baboon, and watch Dr. Charlotte’s tricky surgery on a pangolin whose leg must be amputated after a run-in with poachers. Later, chase a rhino, two young baboons gone AWOL, and a fiesty monitor lizard.

programme.title: E2 - An Island Home
programme.desc: Face a tough decision when Esti’s leg infection puts the brakes on this young duiker’s release. Then track and collar a young lion with Dr. Amanda; check on an ailing bush baby; and greet the noisy new addition to the center, a grumpy grey parrot.

programme.title: E3 - The Young Ones
programme.desc: In this episode of Amazing Animal Friends a rescued orphaned rhino befriended by a playful dog and doting sheep, a big bunny rabbit that babysits boisterous baby lambs, and a porcupine that helps two English bulldogs rehabilitate injured animals.

programme.title: E7 - Chilema and Her Brother
programme.desc: Chilema is an Elephant with half a trunk; losing the tip to a poacher's snare. It was intended to catch antelope for bushmeat. But the snare's indiscriminate nature means other animals often fall foul of them, with devastating results. Chilema is now having to adapt to life without an elephants most important appendage. She must learn how to eat, drink and also take a mud bath to ensure her survival. With the added challenge of the harsh dry season, Chilema is fighting against the odds to survive.

programme.desc: Meet nature’s most wanted and see why the baddest of the bad don’t get the respect they deserve. Admire the great white shark’s electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

programme.title: E2 - A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends including Charlotte, a schnauzer who enjoys bath time with her guinea pig pal Wallace, and a randy ram called Hamish who likes to sneak off to live with a herd of dairy cows instead of his own kind.

programme.title: E3 - The Young Ones
programme.desc: In this episode of Amazing Animal Friends a rescued orphaned rhino befriended by a playful dog and doting sheep, a big bunny rabbit that babysits boisterous baby lambs, and a porcupine that helps two English bulldogs rehabilitate injured animals.

programme.title: Visible Secret II
programme.desc: Jack is laden with ominous anxiety the moment he and his bride Ching step into the new apartment they recently purchase at a suspiciously low price. For one thing, his new neighbors are not only unfriendly but downright creepy. Notwithstanding Jack's miraculous recovery from a near fatal accident by a hit-and-run driver outside his building, everything starts going downhill from this point forward. On the one hand, the image of a gruesome female cadaver pops in and out of Jack's vision whenever he sneezes. On the other, Ching starts behaving most bizarrely, as if she is being possessed...

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E252 -She’s Got No Name
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Hi-Five
programme.desc: The five ordinary people, who developed their superpowers after receiving organ transplants from a previously superpowered being, fighting against another psychic, who also gained the power through transplant and covets their powers.

programme.title: Line Walker
programme.desc: When undercover agent Ding receives an encrypted message from Blackjack, who claims to be an undercover agent that has lost contact with the police, she reports it to her superior officer Inspector Q, who immediately launches a mission to search for Blackjack. During the mission, Ding visits a casino where she discovers that the supposedly dead triad leader Foon-hei is surprisingly alive and kicking. Meanwhile, Inspector Q narrows down Blackjack's whereabouts when he learns of a finance group's involvement in a drug deal in Brazil. The deal involves company chairman Kwok Ming, his advisor Lam, Lam's right-hand man Shiu and Foon-hei, who is plotting a comeback to the crime world. When the players learn of an undercover agent in their midst, paranoia and distrust begin to cloud over the deal...

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E252 -She’s Got No Name
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

Roger Has A Problem
programme.desc: In today's episode, Roger, the dog, has eaten a tennis ball. Will he feel bouncier after an operation to remove it? Also, a pony has a hurt hoof, and there is a pig who thinks he's a dog! And Johnny and Inel find out how to help a constipated guinea pig.

programme.title: The Buzz on Bugs
programme.desc: Eric learns that insects have a head, thorax, abdomen, antennae, and six legs. He is surprised to find out that spiders are not insects – they are arachnids.

programme.title: Federica the Turtle
programme.desc: Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy after a run-in with a container ship. Loro Parque has offered to be her ‘forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly and Jorge, the vet, is worried.

programme.title: Recipe for Success
programme.desc: Ella and Lauren forget about finding dance partners as they head to an ice show in Brighton to brush shoulders with the stars and see if there's another way for them to follow a skating career. And our Ice Stars meet head to head in a baking challenge.

programme.title: Trip to Argentina
programme.desc: Milo, upset by his team's loss, decides to switch teams. Alim insists loyalty is for life and takes them to Argentina. They meet Sabrina, a San Lorenzo fan. After nearly causing a riot by using a wrong color, they learn that in Argentina, team loyalty is forever.

programme.title: Trip to Ukraine
programme.desc: Summer is over for Zoe and Milo, and they're not looking forward to going back to school. But Alim jumps in and wishes them... a happy back-to-school day! And to prove to them it really does exist and truly is a joyful day, our friends embark on a journey to Ukraine.

programme.title: Following the Fibre Optic Trail
programme.desc: How do data and information travel from one computer to another? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of fibre optics. Have hands-on fun by creating fibre optic strands, and get to know Charles Kuen Kao, the godfather of broadband transmission.

programme.title: Childhood
programme.desc: Children of noble stock receive an education in a castle environment while peasant offspring spend their youth working in the fields or at home. Daily life is busy, from a very young age. But kids never forget to have fun and goof around or playing pranks on each other.

programme.title: Mystery of the Reluctant Racer
programme.desc: Addison and Alex's record-setting soap box derby car seems like a shoe-in to win the annual race – until something or someone makes it mysteriously slow down to a crawl. Has it been sabotaged? Addison only has an hour till race time to solve the mystery!

programme.title: Ebb's New Friend
programme.desc: Ebb and Flo are inseparable best friends but Bird arrives and gets in the way. Ebb is upset. Until learning to share is understood. Now Ebb, Bird and Flo are the best of friends. Things couldn't be better!

programme.title: Cancun
programme.desc: Cancun getaway: Parasailing with local teens, exploring Mayan ruins in Coba and village of Tres Reyes, spicy chili contest, refreshing dip in Cenotes, and mastering the art of making Guacamole. A week of sun, adventure, and Mexican delights!

programme.title: Secret Code
programme.desc: Eric learns that computer coding means writing programmes that tell robots and computers how to do certain jobs. Just as we use language to communicate with other people, there are lots of different programming or 'coding' languages to talk to computers.

programme.title: A Strange Trial
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, animals are considered responsible for their actions and must answer to their crimes in a court of law! A crazy trial takes place, with Howler as the animals' attorney and Roach as the judge and persecutor.

programme.title: Find the Culprit
programme.desc: Eric learns that everyone has their own unique fingerprint. He shows how to do a fingerprint experiment and then he uses it to find out who took a bite out of his chocolate cake.

programme.title: Space Myths
programme.desc: Is Mercury the hottest planet in our solar system? No, it's not. There's a lot of misinformation about our solar system. Host Emily Calandrelli speaks to two experts who debunk many of the myths about outer space.

programme.title: Find the Culprit
programme.desc: Eric learns that everyone has their own unique fingerprint. He shows how to do a fingerprint experiment and then he uses it to find out who took a bite out of his chocolate cake.

programme.title: Loki's Castle
programme.desc: The Nektons take over the Dark Orca submarine. But the pirates take over the Aronnax. No one is happy with having strangers in their homes.

programme.title: No Eating in the Lab!
programme.desc: Dr. Xand is shocked when Dr. Chris suggests making pizza in the lab! But little does he know, he is about to have his arms set in plaster as the doctors reveal how your elbows work. And the Cupboard of Everything is on the move again, only this time to the future!

programme.title: Secret Code
programme.desc: Eric learns that computer coding means writing programmes that tell robots and computers how to do certain jobs. Just as we use language to communicate with other people, there are lots of different programming or 'coding' languages to talk to computers.

programme.title: Mystery of the Reluctant Racer
programme.desc: Addison and Alex's record-setting soap box derby car seems like a shoe-in to win the annual race – until something or someone makes it mysteriously slow down to a crawl. Has it been sabotaged? Addison only has an hour till race time to solve the mystery!

programme.title: Federica the Turtle
programme.desc: Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy after a run-in with a container ship. Loro Parque has offered to be her ‘forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly and Jorge, the vet, is worried.

programme.title: Childhood
programme.desc: Children of noble stock receive an education in a castle environment while peasant offspring spend their youth working in the fields or at home. Daily life is busy, from a very young age. But kids never forget to have fun and goof around or playing pranks on each other.

programme.title: Federica the Turtle
programme.desc: Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy after a run-in with a container ship. Loro Parque has offered to be her ‘forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly and Jorge, the vet, is worried.

programme.title: A Strange Trial
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, animals are considered responsible for their actions and must answer to their crimes in a court of law! A crazy trial takes place, with Howler as the animals' attorney and Roach as the judge and persecutor.

programme.title: A Strange Trial
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, animals are considered responsible for their actions and must answer to their crimes in a court of law! A crazy trial takes place, with Howler as the animals' attorney and Roach as the judge and persecutor.

programme.title: Find the Culprit
programme.desc: Eric learns that everyone has their own unique fingerprint. He shows how to do a fingerprint experiment and then he uses it to find out who took a bite out of his chocolate cake.

programme.title: Loki's Castle
programme.desc: The Nektons take over the Dark Orca submarine. But the pirates take over the Aronnax. No one is happy with having strangers in their homes.

programme.title: The Buzz on Bugs
programme.desc: Eric learns that insects have a head, thorax, abdomen, antennae, and six legs. He is surprised to find out that spiders are not insects – they are arachnids.

programme.title: Following the Fibre Optic Trail
programme.desc: How do data and information travel from one computer to another? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of fibre optics. Have hands-on fun by creating fibre optic strands, and get to know Charles Kuen Kao, the godfather of broadband transmission.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E5 - 解鎖民間傳說秘境
programme.desc: 聚焦「非物質文化遺產」主題，由孟非領銜，並邀請了數位00後的非物質文化遺產研學團，一同圍繞8個主題進行深度探訪，旨在全方位、立體化地展現非物質文化遺產的深厚底蘊與時代風采。

programme.title: E3 - 重生之娘娘團商戰打起來了？
programme.desc: 蔡少芬、陶昕然、斕曦、張曉龍、藍盈瑩、陳思斯、楊九郎時隔13年後首次合體重聚，以全新的面貌組成「煥新團」，從承載無數記憶的《甄嬛傳》拍攝地北京大觀園出發，自北向南，由東向西，前往全國多個寶藏民族文化發源地，通過深度探訪、遊學，體驗各地民俗文化和風土人情，帶著回憶和新的憧憬環遊全國以完成“煥新之旅”。

programme.title: E3 - 重生之娘娘團商戰打起來了？
programme.desc: 蔡少芬、陶昕然、斕曦、張曉龍、藍盈瑩、陳思斯、楊九郎時隔13年後首次合體重聚，以全新的面貌組成「煥新團」，從承載無數記憶的《甄嬛傳》拍攝地北京大觀園出發，自北向南，由東向西，前往全國多個寶藏民族文化發源地，通過深度探訪、遊學，體驗各地民俗文化和風土人情，帶著回憶和新的憧憬環遊全國以完成“煥新之旅”。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 以美食出發，傳遞家鄉的味道，用最質樸的方式製作美食，給海外遊子送去家人的慰藉，傳遞濃濃的思鄉之情。

programme.title: E50
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E4 - Hot Rods and Speed Boats
programme.desc: The King Of The North drag race kicks off with Billy scrambling to prepare his hotrod for its race against Chris and the Jet Truck, in a challenge that will see the loser facing public humiliation.

programme.title: E6 - Terry and The Minigun
programme.desc: Can you really fire a GE Minigun handheld with ammunition held in a backpack (also seen on Captain America: Winter Soldier). Additionally, for one of our larger tests – can you actually chop down a jungle forest with a minigun? Actor Bill Duke – who co-starred with Arnold Schwarzenegger for the film and who’s character performed this weapon stunt – joins us to find out. But first, we have to build a jungle.

programme.title: E5 - Waste
programme.desc: Searching for ways to minimize their carbon footprint, Zac and Darin visit a self-sustaining home and other businesses innovating to reduce waste.

programme.desc: Searching for ways to minimize their carbon footprint, Zac and Darin visit a self-sustaining home and other businesses innovating to reduce waste.

programme.title: E8 - Terry vs Gorn
programme.desc: Captain James T Kirk’s battle with the Gorn alien is one of the most popular episodes from the original series. He defeats the Gorn by creating gunpowder from the base elements found on the planet. We partner with Star Trek: Original Series set tour in New York, as we test the reality of making gunpowder by hand without actually blowing yourself up.

programme.desc: Bugs Bunny is in for the ride of his life when he picks up a perfume salesgirl, Lola Bunny, who inadvertently created an invisibility spray. Now the whole world is on their tails!

programme.desc: The kids finally get the puppy they always wanted, except, it's actually a turtle, and it hates them!

programme.desc: The Titans discover the joys of eating breakfast food for every meal, but will that lead to an old friend becoming too powerful?

programme.title: E2 - Thumbelina
programme.desc: Given a South American twist, this animated tale tells the story of Thumbelina, who despite her size, sets out to make a difference in other people's lives.

programme.title: E1 - Belly Bros
programme.desc: When a kid is bummed that his favorite shirt won't fit over his big belly, it's up to Uncle Grandpa to show him that t-shirts come and go, but having a big belly is always cool.

programme.title: E4 - Tiger Trails
programme.desc: Uncle Grandpa just needs his trusty Giant Realistic Flying Tiger, but when he finds out she's gone, it sends Uncle Grandpa on a journey to find the tiger and figure out why she left.

programme.title: E1 - Chocolate Money Badgers
programme.desc: Oscar learns that he can earn merit badges that unlock prizes.

programme.title: E2 - Saxophone Come Home
programme.desc: Oscar befriends a teenage Yeti.

programme.title: E5 - Monster Babies
programme.desc: Alice lures Oscar and his monster friends for a tea party, but only to turn the monsters into cute babies.

programme.title: E1 - Shark Attack
programme.desc: Adam Lyon is the only human student in an all animal School

programme.title: E3 - Lyon Of Scrimmage
programme.desc: Adam is made the school football team's quarterback.

programme.title: E5 - Inoculation Day
programme.desc: When Adam is accidentally inoculated with MONKEY BOOSTER, he 'goes ape', turning into a crazed, pants-less monkey!

programme.title: E7 - Afraid Of The Dark
programme.desc: When Uncle Grandpa helps a little girl who is afraid of the dark, he convinces her there's nothing to be afraid of but their imaginations!

programme.title: E8 - Driver's Test
programme.desc: When a girl has trouble passing her driving test, Uncle Grandpa shows up to help her.

programme.desc: Hedgehog finds a city underneath her bed as she looks for her missing diary.

programme.title: What Lies Beaneath[Live]
programme.desc: After their best friend is killed, four high school friends lie to put a man in jail for the crime, but the lie comes back to haunt them years later when the man escapes prison and threatens their lives once more.

programme.title: Unloving U Ep 1[Live]
programme.desc: Fiona secretly loves her stepbrother Alfie, a feeling she has kept hidden even after their families separated. When they reunite three years later, her emotions intensify, but complications arise-feuding parents, Alfie's girlfriend, and band issues-creating a whirlwind of romantic tension that builds toward a “sweet symphony of love.”

programme.title: Tao Po Ep 1[Live]
programme.desc: 'Tao Po' is a compelling Current Affairs program that uncovers the lives of the 'real people' behind the headlines, offering intimate interviews and insightful glimpses into their personal journeys and the issues they represent.

programme.title: Lady Reporter
programme.desc: FBI Cindy is ordered to Hong Kong to get the leader of counterfeit banknote manufacturing syndicate, Huang Te. In Hong Kong, Huang goes into the printing business. Ostensibly, he publishes a newspaper. But his real business is still the forgoing of banknotes. Cindy gets a job as the paper's reporter but alert Hong Kong police tell her to keep off. It is their job to get Huang. Cindy happens to know her friend's father is the prosecutor in Huang's trial. She tries to help but Huang gets off by poisoning the prosecutor. Now Cindy is desperate. The police want to see her back in America. She wants to get Huang herself...

programme.title: Royal Tramp
programme.desc: Showboy may be uneducated and the son of a prostitute. But he has tact and ambition. One night he saves Chinese partisans from the ruling Manchus led by Prince Aobai...

programme.title: Haunted Office
programme.desc: In every lunar July, there would be nine persons died in this building and no one knows the reason. Ken came to this building for interview. He saw several ladies talking about ghost story in the lobby. Amongst the ladies, he found his old girlfriend, Pat and another attractive girl who was wearing a red dress...

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. E47
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E36
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 《變成你的那一天》講述了頂流大明星江熠和女娛記者餘聲聲因為一次意外，身體和身份互換。兩人面對現狀只能相互指導，幫對方遮掩，因此發生了一系列逗趣搞笑的故事。

programme.title: E1 - What Makes Our Family So Special!
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns what makes his family so special! First, he recounts all the wonderful things about his big sister Jill, from the way they splash in the bathtub to how she takes care of him when he gets a boo boo. Then, he's not interested in spending the day with grandpa, until he sees his vintage motorbike! Together they use their imaginations to take the motorbike through fantastical lands. It's a day of learning how special family is!

programme.title: E2 - When Friends Need a Hero!
programme.desc: Sometimes friends need a hero, & Buster is always ready to help! When he gets caught in a scary storm, he rushes to shelter, but then he spots his friend Scout, stuck in a muddy puddle! Buster has to muster all his courage to go back out & rescue her. But sometimes, even heroes need help! On another day, Buster gets stuck in the mud himself & has to be towed out by Terry Tractor. From stopping a runaway train to standing up to a bully, Buster is always there for his friends.

programme.title: E1 - Learning Colors, Shapes & Numbers!
programme.desc: It's time to learn all about colors, shapes & numbers with Twinkle! First, learn how to count with Twinkle as she finds five balloons in the colors red, blue, green, yellow & purple! Then, join Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to make sandcastles, learning different shapes like squares, triangles & circles. The learning continues as Twinkle & her friends build & count a beautiful tower of rainbow stones & discover the variety of shapes that clouds can take in the sky!

programme.title: E10 - This Flippin' Guy
programme.desc: James butts heads when the competition, fellow flipper Rob, brings him a potential project: a split-level property with a massive yard in a prime neighbourhood. Rob's short on funds and full of confidence.

programme.title: E2
